author: claude
content: feat/sqlalchemy-postgresql-v2 (#1161): landed production wiring on top of current tip — pinned sqlalchemy 2.0.51 + psycopg 3.3.4 (runtime) and pytest-postgresql 8.1.0 (dev) in environment.yaml (fresh-env import smoke green, env-pins hook green); crawler.py now selects SQLAlchemyStorageProvider via OPENWPM_POSTGRES_URL/DB_URL DSN; gated the PG test scenario on pg_config so CI (no PG server) skips instead of erroring. jj-precommit green, pushed, PR MERGEABLE.
